source_basis: Narrow deterministic fixture derived from PP&D plan source facts; not a live crawl or authenticated DevHub capture.

permit_types.label: Standard trade permit
permit_types.source_hint: DevHub FAQ and online permitting tools guidance identify standard trade permits as DevHub-supported account workflows.

permit_types.label: Building permit request with plan review
permit_types.source_hint: DevHub permit application guidance lists building permit application flows, with submission and certification still exact-confirmation gated.

permit_types.label: Permit type not available in DevHub
permit_types.source_hint: PP&D plan source facts state some permit types must be submitted by email or other paths, so DevHub coverage must not be assumed.

permit_types.label: Email-only special review path
permit_types.source_hint: Manual/email submission paths require human routing outside attended DevHub browser automation.

permit_types.label: Portland Maps public property reference
permit_types.source_hint: Portland Maps is a public reference surface linked from PP&D guidance, not a DevHub permit application automation path.
